ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range for the size */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range for the size */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Bust measurement range */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hips_range" TEXT /* Hips measurement range */,
  "numeric_size" TEXT /* Numeric size equivalent */,
  "inseam_range" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length_range" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand's website URL */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Brand's social media handles */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items available in stock */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product's image */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Customer's birthdate */,
  "preferred_communication_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred communication method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* User's full name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* User's job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product whose inventory is being logged */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., 'added', 'removed') */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Amount changed in the inventory */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standard_sizes" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id", "size_id")
)
